title: Supernatural Encounter by Realm
note: generate:element — what the uncanny (or the mundane world) throws at the covenant. The Realm tag governs behaviour (see interpretation.md) and which aura is in play. Supernatural foes carry a Might (Realm) = their Magic Resistance.

entries.value: Magic — a proud beast of virtue or magical animal guarding a rich vis source.
Magic — an indifferent elemental or spirit of place (mountain, storm, river) that may bargain on its own terms.
Faerie — a trickster fae demanding a bargain, bound to play out its story; honours the letter, exploits the wording.
Faerie — a faerie luring intruders into its tale (a Wild Hunt, a tricked giant, a glamoured court).
Infernal — a demon tempting a covenant member toward sin or a diabolical pact; never bargains honestly.
Infernal — a diabolist or infernal cult working corruption from within an Infernal aura.
Divine — a holy site, relic, or strong Dominion aura that suppresses and weakens Hermetic magic.
Divine — a saint, holy hermit, or person of True Faith whose presence resists demons and magic alike.
Mundane — bandits or outlaws on the roads near the covenant.
Mundane — plague, famine, or fire striking the covenant's covenfolk and neighbours.
Mundane — a suspicious mob or fearful villagers turning against the 'witches' in their midst.
Mundane — a feudal lord, tax collector, or Church official intruding on covenant lands.
